Title: A Comparative Analysis of Advanced Modulation and Coding Schemes for LEO Based Satellite Network
Authors: Deepika Revankar Manjunath
Abstract: Satellite communication using LEO is gaining popular acceptance, owing to its capabilities of ubiquitous coverage, high speed and minimum latency. Authors: Lin Cheng, Wei Men, Wei Ge, Jiaheng Zhang, Jingwei Yin
Abstract: Reliable and efficient multi-user acoustic communication (MUAC) is essential for underwater acoustic sensor networks. Authors: Jie Dong, Kui Cai, Zhen Mei, Bin Dai, Xingwei Zhong
Abstract: Spin-transfer torque magnetic random access memory (STT-MRAM) has attracted significant attention as a promising memory technology for consumer electronics. Abstract: Wireless key generation systems often face challenges in achieving low Key Disagreement Rates (KDR) and Key Generation Rate (KGR) across diverse scenarios, limiting their reliability and efficiency.
